name: python3-fastmcp
title: python3-fastmcp
summary: fast, Pythonic way to build MCP servers and clients
description:
fast, Pythonic way to build MCP servers and clients
This package contains FastMCP 2.0 — the actively maintained,
production-ready framework that extends far beyond basic protocol
implementation. While the SDK provides core functionality, FastMCP 2.0
delivers everything needed for production: advanced MCP patterns (server
composition, proxying, OpenAPI/FastAPI generation, tool transformation),
enterprise auth (Google, GitHub, WorkOS, Azure, Auth0, and more), deployment
tools, testing utilities, and comprehensive client libraries.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use fastmcp because fast, Pythonic way to build MCP servers and clients.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use fastmcp as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `fastmcp [options] [args]` as documented upstream for fastmcp.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair fastmcp with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `fastmcp --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
